narrative:
Precinct Duncan Falls (precinct in Muskingum County) has 836 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.9 percentage points.
